She paused for a moment, then added, "Besides, since this collaboration has been so pleasant, I don't have much to say in return. Lyu was somewhat surprised. Such old and well-shaped ornamental trees are very expensive, especially for wealthy people who value fun symbolism. Llan, this gift is too extravagant. Andy said, "It's not heavy at all. It's nothing compared to how much you've taken care of me." Llan wave her hand, her smile sincere. Besides, I've already had this tree transported over, and I even found an experienced planter to help me decide where to plant it. When the group arrived at the courtyard, they saw several people unloading goods. On the truck was a lush and beautifully shaped potarpus macrofilis. Its ancient and vigorous appearance clearly indicating its high value. Lenu thanked Lawn again, and after discussing it with Andy, they decided to plant the potarpus macrofilis next to the newly built pavilion in the courtyard. Just then, a system notification sounded in Linu's mind. Ding. Lon has spent 476,800 yuan for the host, triggering a consumption refund. Land's friendship level is 73, plot weight is 2, and the refund amount is 69,612,800 yuan. The potarpus macrofilage tree that Llon gave her was indeed very valuable, costing over 470,000 yuan. The amount returned was nearly 70 million. Lu had actually thought about it before since Lon would always give him a gift every time she helped him with his renovations, which was why he kept hiring Lon Lawn for renovations. However, he had already given the villa to Andy and completed all the formalities, so he was really unsure whether it could be returned this time. It seems the system did recognize it. It probably knew that Lon gave the gift to itself, and it couldn't possibly assume that Andy's gift was also its own, could it? Anyway, brother Tong is really awesome. He spent 128 million on a villa and Andy gave him a purple clay teapot, so he got 330 million back. Now he spent over 20 million on renovating his house and Lonlon gave him a potarpus macrofilis tree, so he earned over 40 million. This exploit was so blatant it left everyone speechless. Lynu mentally gave the system a thousand thumbs up. Andy noticed the smile on Linux's face and asked puzzled, "What's wrong? What are you laughing at so happily?" Lyu snapped out of his days and quickly covered it up, saying, "It's nothing. I just think the pot of carpus macrofilus that Lon gave us is really nice. It looks really good planted in the courtyard." And with the renovation going so smoothly, it seems like we'll be able to move in soon. Andy nodded, his tone full of anticipation. Yes, the renovation is almost finished. It'll be done soon. That evening, the two had dinner together and then returned to Andy's room. Lyu was particularly excited today, partly because the system had returned another sum of money and the renovation was almost complete, and partly because Chioing had provoked him to the hotel last night, almost turning him into Optimus Prime. Upon returning to 2201, Linu's excitement was completely unleashed. Andy initially responded gently, but soon discovered that Lenu was unusually enthusiastic today, as if he had inexhaustible energy. She put in all her effort, even setting aside her usual rationality and reserve, and unusually learned some new knowledge that she was not usually willing to learn. She even recited poems fluently, such as a small bridge over a flowing stream, an ancient road in the west wind. However, it was still difficult to resist Lynn Yu's wave after wave of enthusiasm. After a tender moment of careful consideration, Andy was exhausted, her body aching all over, and she didn't even have the strength to lift her arm. Her voice had become horsearse as she pleaded with Lu. Lu, I can't go on. I'm too tired. Looking at her exhausted appearance, her cheeks slightly flushed and her eyes glazed over. Lynn Yu's burning passion gradually subsided, replaced by a pang of heartache. He knew that Andy had already done her best, and if he continued to torment her, it would definitely hurt her body. So, he stopped his actions hastily. Andy lay limply in Linu's arms, his chest rising and falling slightly as he gasped for breath.
